allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; h=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(h[''''Status'''']\); [print\(l[''''Output'''']\) for l in h[''''Log''''][-2:]]")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; logs=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(l[''''Output'''']\) for l in logs[-2:]]")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(''''healthy:'''', d[''''totals''''][''''healthy''''], ''''| running:'''', d[''''totals''''][''''running''''], ''''| total labs:'''', d[''''totals''''][''''total'''']\)" echo "=== Inventory Core - health ===")
Bash(curl -sf http://localhost:8000/health echo "=== Inventory Core - ready ===")
Bash(curl -sf http://localhost:8000/ready echo "=== Inventory Core - summary ===")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(d\)" echo "=== Operations Portal - health ===")
Bash(curl -sf http://localhost:3003/api/health echo "=== Operations Portal - overview ===")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(''''summary:'''', d[''''summary''''], ''''| watchlist:'''', len\(d[''''watchlist'''']\), ''''| attention:'''', len\(d[''''attentionBoard'''']\)\)" echo "=== Platform Gateway ===")
